design_philosophy.vibe: Low Dopamine, High Focus, Stoic Utility
principles: No Confetti: Celebration is progress, not particles.
Data over Decoration: If it doesn't help you study, delete it.
Darkness is Focus: The interface recedes; the content advances.
Tactile Precision: Buttons click, they don't float. Inputs feel solid.

usage_rules: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Solid Slate-900 only.
Use Primary Blue (#2563EB) ONLY for the main action on the screen.
Use Secondary Purple (#5B21B6) for 'Deep Work' or 'Focus Mode' related elements.
Success Green is for completed UAs only.
Borders should be subtle: border-slate-800 or border-white/5.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grids.

containers.main: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
containers.focus_mode: max-w-2xl mx-auto h-screen flex flex-col justify-center

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.style: bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-slate-900/80 border-b border-white/5 (Use only for sticky headers)
visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle noise texture overlay at 2% opacity to the background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-xl shadow-black/20 for floating elements. No diffuse colored shadows.

motion.instructions: Install framer-motion. Use it for layout transitions (layout prop) and subtle entrance animations.

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple geometric arc shape (SVG) in Primary Blue.

assets.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge' if not present.
2. CSS VARIABLES: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css to match the 'colors.palette' defined above. Specifically, override the 'card' and 'background' colors for dark mode.
3. LAYOUT: Implement the 'DashboardLayout' using a fixed sidebar and a scrollable main area.
4. EMPTY STATE: Since the DB starts empty, create a beautiful 'Empty State' component for the Dashboard that guides the user to 'Create your first Discipline'. Do not leave it blank.
5. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards). Format: 'page-section-element-action'.
6. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for all notifications. Style them to match the dark theme (black bg, white text, thin border).
7. DATE PICKER: Use the Shadcn Calendar component. Do not use native date inputs.
8. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style the tooltips to be dark and minimal.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark Mode Only: The app is strictly dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly requested later.
Input Focus: When an input is focused, the border should be Primary Blue, but the ring should be subtle.
Typography: Always use 'tracking-tight' for headings (h1, h2, h3).
